title: Dutch Spring Vegetable Pilaf
description: A hearty and flavorful vegetarian pilaf dish featuring a medley of spring vegetables.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced spring onion and cook for 1-2 minutes until translucent.
Add sliced carrots and cook for an additional 3-4 minutes until tender.
Add sliced bell peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes until they start to soften.
Add pilaf rice mix and stir to combine with vegetables.
Cook for 2-3 minutes until rice is lightly toasted.
Add 2 cups of water to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes or until rice is cooked and liquid is absorbed.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
